notes.text: Initial assessment: chronic lower back pain 10 years. Gait shows right hip drop. Limited ankle dorsiflexion left side.
Hip drop improving. Patient reports being able to sit for 2 hours without pain (was 30 min).
Gait re-analysis: hip drop reduced from 3cm to 1.5cm. Walking 30 min pain-free now.
Pain at 3/10. Pelvic tilt correction added. Great compliance with homework.
Initial assessment: Forward head posture 4.5cm anterior. Thoracic kyphosis significant. Neck pain 7/10.
Week 4: Visible posture improvement. Colleague at work noticed she's 'standing taller'.
Week 6: Forward head reduced to 2cm. Arm swing connecting with rotation. Neck pain 2/10.
Assessment: Right shoulder pain connected to left hip external rotation. Classic cross-body compensation pattern.
Shoulder pain dropped from 8 to 5 after hip correction work. She's amazed the shoulder is improving from hip exercises.
Post-pregnancy assessment: Diastasis recti 3.5 finger widths. Core disconnected. Posture collapsed.
Week 2: Diastasis down to 2.5 finger widths. Breathing patterns improving. Feels 'more solid' in daily life.
